text: I got assigned an endometriosis nurse at the end of last year. She's fantastic however she is based over 200 miles away and covers a massive area. I agree with Liz, everyone with endo deserves a local endo nurse!
Hi Liz - Am I able to message this page with some questions for you please? I had ablation on bilateral utero sacral endometriosis over 10 years ago 😬
